channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AAA Study: EV Performance and Temperature
item.description: AAA research examines how temperature affects the range of electric vehicles.

item.title: DHS Shutdown Concludes; May Day Protests Planned
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security shutdown has ended. May Day demonstrations are expected across the country.

item.title: Quiz: Actions of the Trump Administration
item.description: Test your knowledge of recent federal actions, including legal and symbolic developments.

item.title: Chinese Company Terminates Employee Using AI System
item.description: A Hangzhou employee's termination following the implementation of artificial intelligence is under legal review.
